title: Lol (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lol''' may refer to one of the following:

==Individuals==
*'''[[Lol (individual)|Lol]]''', an individual from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]]
*'''[[Lol Miilarta]]''', a [[Hapan]] legislator
*'''[[Lol Wikma]]''', a [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] employee of the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]

==Locations==
*The '''[[Lol sector/Legends|Lol sector]]''', an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]
*The '''[[Lol system/Legends|Lol system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the Lol sector

{{Disambig}}
